name: provenance manifest generation-time consumption block carries compliance_state per the schema
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc","compliance_state":{"nist-csf-2":{"controls_consulted":["GV.OC"],"fetched_at":"t","edition":"2.0","freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency","legal_review_status_for_consulted":["pending"]}}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --check compliance-state 2>out.txt && grep -q 'compliance_state_present=true' out.txt && grep -q 'frameworks_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
